task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number)
Write a regular expression to match valid AWS IAM role ARNs in the format arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name
Write a Python function that extracts the region and service name from an AWS ARN string
